body.text: Lyra Vane is the last sworn Lantern-Keeper of the city of [[old-sereth|Old Sereth]], tasked with guarding the flames that hold back the Long Dark. Stubborn and quick-witted, she inherited the role from her grandmother under circumstances she rarely discusses.

Raised in the lantern-towers, Lyra trained from childhood to read the moods of the sacred fire. When the [[the-long-dark|Long Dark]] returned in Year 437, she was the only keeper who refused to abandon her post.
A light only matters when something is trying to put it out.
A mapmaker who claims to have charted every road out of [[old-sereth|Old Sereth]] — and a few that no longer exist. Corvin's loyalty is hard to win and harder to keep.
